summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Apps Innovation SAS website. All major functionality working correctly including backend API, frontend UI, navigation, contact form, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and all endpoints working (4/4 tests passed)
Homepage loads correctly with all sections visible
Navigation menu works for all links (Inicio, Nosotros, Servicios, Proyectos, Testimonios, Contacto)
Hero section displays correctly with CTA buttons
Services section shows 6 service cards as expected
Projects section shows 4 project cards as expected
Testimonials section shows 3 testimonial cards as expected
Contact form submission works correctly with backend integration
Footer links work correctly (7 links found)
Mobile menu toggle works correctly on mobile viewport
Contact form accessible and functional on mobile devices
